companies.eligibilityText: 60% or above throughout (10th, 12th, UG, PG). Max 2-year academic gap.

companies.name: IndiaMart
companies.eligibilityText: 65% in X/XII, 50% or above in Graduation/MBA

eligibility.academics: B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech/MCA in CS/IT or related fields with consistent academic record
selectionProcess: Online Coding Test (5-6 questions on DSA)
eligibility.notes: Strong problem-solving and system design required
Strong English and Hindi communication required
Focus on coding and project understanding
Strong CS fundamentals and problem-solving required
Focus on technical basics and communication

eligibility.academics: 70% in X/XII with high CGPA in B.Tech/M.Tech/MCA
eligibility.notes: Project-based hiring, strong ML knowledge required
Strong analytical and coding skills required
Focus on aptitude and technical basics

eligibility.academics: Graduate in Journalism or related fields
Minimum 60% or 6.0 CGPA throughout 10th, 12th, and Graduation
eligibility.notes: GitHub projects and contributions are prioritized over resumes

eligibility.academics: B.Tech/B.E. in CS/IT or related fields with 60%+ throughout
eligibility.notes: Medium to hard DSA questions; strong project understanding required

selectionProcess: Written Round: MCQ Questions on aptitude and computer science fundamental subjects, Programming Logics.
Coding Round: Medium - Hard Level Data Structure and Algorithms
Technical Interview: Data Structure and Algorithms Questions and Discussion on Projects and Computer Science Concepts
Aptitude and personal assessment test: MCQ Questions asked in English and Mathematics.
Written Round: MCQ Questions on aptitude and computer science fundamental subjects, Programming Logics.
Coding Round: Medium - Hard Level Data Structure and Algorithms
Technical Interview: Data Structure and Algorithms Questions and Discussion on Projects and Computer Science Concepts
Aptitude and personal assessment test: MCQ Questions asked in English and Mathematics.

eligibility.degrees: Graduated or expected graduation from a 4-year university, graduate school, or technical college

selectionProcess: 2nd Selection (Personal interview and group discussion - Online)
Feedback: Online feedback on the 2nd selection (no pass/fail decision)
Technical Interview (Basic Coding + SQL + Resume Questions)
